valid.name: keep-required-quotes

invalid.name: redundant-quotes

errors.message: The identifier `"id"` does not need quoting; `id` means the same thing.
The identifier `"name"` does not need quoting; `name` means the same thing.
The identifier `"users"` does not need quoting; `users` means the same thing.
The identifier `"active"` does not need quoting; `active` means the same thing.

invalid.output: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = TRUE;
